error_signature: duplicate messages sent by WhatsApp node
title: Duplicate messages sent by WhatsApp node
symptom: The WhatsApp node sends duplicate messages and saves duplicate records in Google Sheets. The execution log shows only one execution.
applies_when: No filters set for data retrieval
not_this_if: Filters are applied to the data retrieval
root_cause: The WhatsApp node executes once for each item it receives. If the input data contains duplicates or multiple items, it will send multiple messages unless filtered appropriately.
fix_steps: Set appropriate filters for the Get Rows operation in Google Sheets
Save the workflow and test again
agent_instruction: Enable 'Execute Once' in the WhatsApp node and set filters for the Get Rows operation.
